rawContent:
The repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps, and there's no Azure DevOps organization configured. I cannot query Azure DevOps pull requests without:

1. An Azure DevOps organization URL
2. A project name
3. Valid authentication (PAT token)

Please provide:
- Your Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrg/`)
- The project name
- Ensure you're logged in via `az devops login`
